input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule V.3.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

            TITLE: in any angular position, the steering wheel must meet t.1.4.4

V.3.3.1 In any angular position, the Steering Wheel must meet T.1.4.4

final_answer: In any angular position, the Steering Wheel must meet T.1.4.4
